summary: Completed frontend testing of mobile 2x2 grid layout for meal planner. All features working correctly - mobile view shows all 4 meal slots in a compact 2x2 grid, expansion/collapse accordion behavior works, TODAY badge and orange border highlighting visible, meal count indicators and thumbnail previews functional, desktop 4-column layout unchanged.
passed_tests: Mobile: 2x2 grid layout displays all 4 meal slots (Bfast, Lunch, Snack, Dinner) on one screen
Mobile: Clicking meal slot expands it to full width (col-span-2)
Mobile: Add Recipe button visible after expansion
Mobile: Clicking expanded slot collapses it back to grid
Mobile: Meal count indicator (green badge) shows number of planned meals
Mobile: Thumbnail preview visible in collapsed state for slots with recipes
Mobile: TODAY badge visible with orange highlighting on current day
Mobile: Orange ring/border on today's card
Mobile: Remove buttons functional for each meal
Mobile: Recipe finder modal opens when clicking Add Recipe button
Desktop: 4-column layout unchanged (Breakfast, Lunch, Snacks, Dinner)
Desktop: Mobile slots hidden on desktop viewport (md: breakpoint)
Desktop: Add buttons visible on each meal slot
Desktop: TODAY badge and orange border visible
Desktop: Gap Analysis sidebar visible on right side
App.js: min-w-0 fix applied to main element preventing viewport overflow
critical_code_review_comments: PlannerPage.js correctly implements separate mobile (md:hidden) and desktop (hidden md:grid) views
Mobile 2x2 grid uses grid-cols-2 with col-span-2 for expansion
expandedMealSlot state properly tracks which slot is expanded using dateStr-mealType key
App.js min-w-0 on main element correctly prevents flex item overflow
Proper data-testid attributes on all interactive elements for testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing meal plan data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile 2x2 grid layout for meal planner fully tested. Key implementation: separate mobile view (md:hidden) with grid-cols-2 and accordion expansion (col-span-2), desktop view unchanged with 4-column layout. The min-w-0 fix in App.js prevents the main element from expanding beyond viewport. All meal slot interactions (expand, collapse, add recipe, remove meal) working correctly.

mocked_apis.Translation API: /api/translate uses static dictionary instead of Google Translate API
mocked_apis.YouTube API: Has quota limits, mitigated with caching
